name: Beth Goldstein
bio: Beth founded the BethGold Foundation in 2019 with a vision of building inclusive communities where every individual, regardless of ability, has access to the resources and support they need to thrive.

name: Samuel Okafor
bio: Samuel oversees all field operations and project delivery, bringing over 10 years of experience in community development and humanitarian response across West Africa.

name: Amina Diallo
bio: Amina leads strategic partnerships and donor relations, connecting the foundation with NGOs, institutions, and corporate partners who share our commitment to positive change.

name: James Mensah
bio: James coordinates all health outreach initiatives, working directly with communities to deliver free medical care, screenings, and health education programs.
